description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, macos-latest, windows-latest) with different presets (clang-ci-coverage, gcc-release, gcc-9-release, macos-release, win64-release). For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies if necessary, configure with cmake, build, run tests, and upload code coverage if the preset is clang-ci-coverage.
